source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Analyses/RatingCurve/RatingCurveAnalysis.cs @ fc28c0c -- X11 SELF-COMPUTED structural smoke oracle. RatingCurveAnalysis (X3) drives a seeded DEMCzs MCMC over a single-segment BaRatin RatingCurve (15 date-aligned stage/discharge pairs), then builds the predicted-discharge mode/mean curve + credible band over 20 Stratify stage bins. curve_length == 20 (mode_curve length == stage_bins) is the deterministic length invariant reproduced bit-identically across C++/R/Python. NOTE: RatingCurve::predict uses a seeded MersenneTwister noise draw (a documented model deviation), so the seeded values are NOT C#-reproducible -- X12 pins the reproducible quantities (mode curve at MAP, AIC/BIC) via the emitter driver it must add; the length invariant is honest here.
